_comment: Compliance rules derived from Claude Code system prompt. These are objective checks — did Claude follow its own documented instructions? Update when Claude Code changes tool guidance or behavioral constraints.

tool_selection._comment: System prompt: 'Do NOT use Bash to run commands when a relevant dedicated tool is provided.'

misuse_patterns.prompt_rule: To read files use Read instead of cat, head, tail, or sed
To read files use Read instead of cat, head, tail, or sed
To read files use Read instead of cat, head, tail, or sed
To edit files use Edit instead of sed or awk
To edit files use Edit instead of sed or awk
To search the content of files, use Grep instead of grep or rg
To search the content of files, use Grep instead of grep or rg
To search for files use Glob instead of find or ls
To search for files use Glob instead of find or ls
To create files use Write instead of echo redirection

anti_patterns._comment: Behavioral constraints from Claude Code system prompt.

rules.prompt_rule: Do not retry failing commands in a sleep loop — diagnose the root cause.
If your approach is blocked, do not attempt to brute force your way to the outcome.
Subagents should not be used excessively when not needed.
Do not propose changes to code you haven't read. If a user asks about or wants you to modify a file, read it first.
